headline: Scotiabank Raises Federal Realty (FRT) Price Target, Sees Room for Outperformance
summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust (NYSE:FRT) is included among the Dividend Kings and Aristocrats List: 32 Biggest Stocks. On March 24, Scotiabank analyst Nicholas Yulico raised the firm’s price recommendation on Federal Realty Investment Trust (NYSE:FRT) to $118 from $113. It reiterated an Outperform rating on the shares. The analyst said the firm is updating its […]
